title: What is Caliber?
lines: Caliber scans your project and generates tailored configs
for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex — so your AI agent
understands your codebase from the start.

title: Generated Configs
lines: CLAUDE.md and .cursor/rules/ tell your AI agent about
your build commands, conventions, architecture, and tools.
Think of them as onboarding docs — but for your copilot.

title: Skills
lines: Skills are reusable task-specific instructions your agent
loads on demand — deploy scripts, migration patterns, etc.
Run `caliber skills` to search the community registry.

title: Keep Configs Fresh
lines: As your code evolves, configs drift. `caliber refresh`
reads your recent git diffs and updates configs to match.
Add it as a post-commit hook for hands-free updates.

title: Score Your Setup
lines: `caliber score` runs 20+ checks against your config —
grounding, accuracy, freshness — and gives a letter grade.
Aim for an A to get the most out of your AI agent.

title: Quick Health Check
lines: `caliber status` shows what you have configured,
which hooks are active, and if anything needs attention.
It runs in under a second — great for CI checks too.
